supporting_quote: Gene target quantities obtained by real-time PCR are normalized using either the expression level of GAPDH, a gene whose expression is constant, or by quantifying total RNA using RiboGreen (Molecular Probes, Inc. Eugene, Oreg.).
notes: Standard Ionis in-vitro RT-qPCR assay (A549, 75 nM). No ACTB.
